rationale: The citing paper studies branded mobile app launch announcements and app design effects on firm value, while the cited paper focuses on biopharmaceutical acquisition performance driven by innovation/relational overlap—there is no clear topical or construct-level overlap in the notes. The only apparent commonality is generic use of announcement-period CAR/event-study methods, and the raw evidence provides just a single DOI match with no in-text context. This looks more like an incidental/background methodological citation than substantive use.
